content.en:
Although Ye Tian has a good relationship with the white-bearded old man, he will not agree to cooperate with the white-bearded old man at a loss.

If you offend the other Eternal Masters, that's not a good thing.

He didn't think he could be protected by the Half-Tooth Controller or the Great Being, so he was more cautious.

If the Eternal Master really wants to kill him, his original body and other replica bodies will be bombarded unless they are protected by another Eternal Master.

For example, this is how Lord Yunsen fell.

So, he had to be cautious.

The white-bearded old man felt that Ye Tian should be so cautious, so he introduced: "Actually, I have always stayed in the realm of the half-step Eternal Master, and I don't want to attack the Eternal Master, but I also want to get the opportunity of that place, so I have always been unwilling to break through. But the opportunity of that place is too precious, and I have to be cautious with a small "five, six, seven". "

"As for where it is, I can't say right now, but I can tell you what will be in there. Strictly speaking, it was supposed to be a special treasure place that had been transformed, and upon entering the entrance, I met a fallen Eternal Master. The Eternal Master was supposed to be the first to discover the treasure land, but he forced his way into it and was slain by the rules there. And I can get in, but I can't go deeper. Even so, I also gained a lot of treasures and resources on the periphery. "

"For example, the treasures that can improve the power of the will, known as the top ten in the Boundary River, the Thousand Tribulation Fruits, I have found more than a dozen, and with these Thousand Tribulation Fruits, I have raised my will to the late eighth order!"

As he spoke, the white-bearded old man's willpower emerged.

Rumble!!!!!

The strong willpower made Ye Tiandu feel very amazing.

Eighth-Order Late Will!

Ye Tian thought that he was invincible, but he only raised his will to the middle of the eighth order, and the old man with white beard actually raised his will to the late eighth order, this is incredible.

Although the strength of the white-bearded old man is still far inferior to him, this luck is really invincible.

If the Void Region hadn't given birth to him, the true son of luck in the Void Region would have been a white-bearded old man.

"Old man with white beard, although the half-step Eternal Master can enter there, there must still be danger, otherwise you wouldn't be looking for me!"

Ye Tian said.

The white-bearded old man nodded, "It's dangerous, and I've fallen too many times." Although it was a treasure land, it was a little strange that I saw the space-time shadow of a building, located in the depths of that treasure land. Even the Eternal Masters had fallen when they entered there, how could there be a building there, unless there was a great being far beyond the normal Eternal Masters who had been there, but had set up a chance. And there is a moat between the outer and inner walls of that treasure land, it is a forest, but I think that forest is a whole special life, similar to the life of the Black Silent Sea. I entered the forest, and before I could go far, I was killed. "

"Has the strength of that forest reached the realm of the Eternal Master?" Ye Tian asked.

The white-bearded old man shook his head, "Naturally, no, if I had reached the Eternal Master, I would have given up a long time ago, and I would not have come to you." According to my inference, the strength of the other party is probably comparable to that of a half-step eternal controller who has controlled ninety percent of the supreme legendary body. In the Boundary River, there are still a few half-step eternal controllers who control eighty percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, but I have never heard of a half-step Eternal Controller who controls ninety percent of the Supreme Legendary Body. "

"But, Endless Lord, I'm afraid your current strength is not weaker than the half-step Eternal Controller who has controlled ninety percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, right?"

The white-bearded old man asked.

"Yes, I am indeed not weaker than the half-step Eternal Controller who has controlled the Ninety Percent Supreme Legendary Body!" Ye Tian said with great confidence, he was not only not weaker, but stronger, but there was no need to brag about himself.

After chatting with the white-bearded old man for a while, Ye Tian finally decided to cooperate with the white-bearded old man.

As the white-bearded old man said, there are so many opportunities on the periphery, if you enter the inner perimeter, wouldn't it be a complete rise.

Moreover, it is very likely that that the treasure land has something to do with the inheritance of the great being.

Who knows how that kind of existence selects destined people, maybe it will really throw a inheritance into the depths of that treasure land, and those who are destined can obtain it.

It's like the map of the secret inheritance of swallowing that the half-tooth master obtained, and the same.

If you get the slightest benefit of such a great being, you will take off directly.

Therefore, Ye Tian really wanted to take a look.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man each sent a doppelganger to that place, of course, it was the white-bearded old man who took Ye Tian.......... ，

The white-bearded old man would not say the exact location until he got there.

I saw that the two of them passed through one giant city after another, crossed one boundary river territory after another, and finally flew to a certain area through the Wanwan giant city, and this flight was a full tenth of the boundary river years.

This shows how remote this place is, and there is not even a giant city nearby.

Ye Tian was very puzzled, how did the white-bearded old man find such a remote boundary river area?

"Old man with white beard, how did you find this treasure land?"

Ye Tian couldn't help but ask.

The white-bearded old man said lightly: "Luck, I once encountered the space-time turbulence in the boundary river, was swept away, and accidentally fell into a strange territory, and then flew and found it. "

"This luck!"

Ye Tian had to say that the luck of the white-bearded old man was really good.

......

"It's here!"

The white-bearded old man stopped.

Ye Tian looked at it, and the layers of void around him were all in his perception.

Soon, in a certain space-time region, he only sensed a black crack, and the others could not be perceived.

Obviously, that's where they're going.

"Let's go inside!"

The white-bearded old man said.

Rushing!!

The two of them crossed layers of time and space and came to the black crack.

From a distant area, this 4.6 miles are black cracks, but up close, it is a huge spatial entrance.

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and directly entered this entrance with the white-bearded old man.

Come in!

Ye Tian stood on a piece of land, the rules here were a little different from the outside world, and the spatial suppression was very huge, and the power of time and space was suppressed here.

And it's full of energy, and it's amazing.

Not only that, there are also a large number of resources within Ye Tian's perception range, although there are no too good resources, but the number of resources here is extremely amazing.

At this time, the white-bearded old man said: "I haven't been here for a while, and there are a lot of new resources here!"

These resources have limited years of growth and do little to help them.

Therefore, Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man did not go to pick these resources, but went directly to the inner area. _
